The '''Nubian B4 Cloudbus''' was a popular model of civilian [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] manufactured by [[Nubia Star Drives, Incorporated/Legends|Nubian Design Collective]] and comprising the vast majority of the public transportation on the planet [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. Seating 36 passengers, the blue-and-gray, elongated oval-shaped vehicle was equipped with three [[Nubia Star Drives, Incorporated/Legends|Nubia Star Drives]] [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]]. The vehicle operated at high altitudes and could even transport its passengers to orbital stations, though it was incapable of interplanetary flight.

{{Veh-stub}}
